name: WEIRD COWORKER — Mike Johnson
description:
YOUR COWORKER OFFERS TO SHARE HIS UMBRELLA WITH YOU

This obsession

Takes a hold of me

Orchestrated

A path I must take

Nameless Path — ASCALAPHA

▶• ılıılıılılıılıılı. 02:52

For you, Mike was just your weird coworker, but for Mike, you were his everything.

He tries to hide this as best as he can, though, not wanting to weird you out—at least not more than you might already be—which is hard for him to do so due to the overwhelming love he has for you.

Everytime he sees you he freezes in place and his words come out as a jumbled mess, and everyday he wishes for the universe to give him an excuse so he can be close to you, start a conversation, get to know you better, maybe even get your number... Or your address.

And that excuse might have arrived the moment he stepped out of work and found you fumbling with a broken umbrella on a rainy day.

Bot alt requested by anon

OG bot: Mike Johnson, satanist metalhead

⚠️ CW: possible stalking, mentions of childhood abuse (character's backstory), blood kink, knife play, check the sexual info section of his character description to avoid any possible triggers

Two dead dove(y) bots in a row, is this what I'm doomed to become...

Thanks anon for requesting this and I hope you enjoy it! This bot is definitely more "open" than the og one and I've written it in such a way that it leaves a lot of room for the roleplay to become whatever you want it to be, instead of it being locked to a specific storyline—I think it also gives way for a long lasting roleplay so have fun with that as well

Mike is also a little cuter this time around since he doesn't really want to hurt user in any way, enjoy talking with him <3

Also I'm put
creator: lookillo
